# Deterministic Lab Model Expansion Baseline

**Bead**: `asupersync-2oh2u.10.1` ([T8.1])
**Generated by**: FuchsiaGorge (codex-cli / gpt-5)
**Date**: 2026-03-03
**Dependencies**: T1.3.c roadmap baseline (`asupersync-2oh2u.1.3.3`), T2.1/T3.1/T5.1/T6.1 parity baselines, T7.2 adapter boundary architecture
**Purpose**: Expand deterministic lab/runtime modeling so newly closed replacement domains have explicit schedule-control semantics, replay artifact contracts, and scenario coverage targets before executable conformance contracts in T8.2.

---

## 1. Scope and Closure Inputs

T8.1 is a model-expansion bead, not a feature-implementation bead. It defines deterministic modeling requirements over replacement tracks that already produced capability baselines.

| Input Bead | Domain | Input Artifact | Modeling Impact |
|---|---|---|---|
| `asupersync-2oh2u.2.1` | Async I/O parity audit | `docs/tokio_io_parity_audit.md` | Requires deterministic read/write cancel and readiness model families. |
| `asupersync-2oh2u.3.1` | Filesystem/process/signal parity matrix | `docs/tokio_fs_process_signal_parity_matrix.md` | Requires deterministic platform-divergence and lifecycle model families. |
| `asupersync-2oh2u.5.1` | Web/middleware/gRPC parity map | `docs/tokio_web_grpc_parity_map.md` | Requires deterministic request pipeline, middleware, and gRPC stream model families. |
| `asupersync-2oh2u.6.1` | Database/messaging gap baseline | `docs/tokio_db_messaging_gap_baseline.md` | Requires deterministic protocol-fault and retry/idempotency model families. |
| `asupersync-2oh2u.7.2` | Interop adapter boundary architecture | `docs/tokio_adapter_boundary_architecture.md` | Requires deterministic boundary-bridge and capability propagation model families. |

Deterministic model expansion for T8.1 targets the following runtime surfaces:

- `src/lab/runtime.rs`
- `src/lab/config.rs`
- `src/lab/replay.rs`
- `src/lab/explorer.rs`
- `src/lab/chaos.rs`
- `src/lab/scenario_runner.rs`
- `src/lab/network/harness.rs`
- `src/lab/oracle/cancellation_protocol.rs`
- `src/lab/oracle/loser_drain.rs`
- `src/lab/oracle/obligation_leak.rs`
- `src/lab/oracle/task_leak.rs`
- `src/lab/oracle/determinism.rs`

---

## 2. Deterministic Model Matrix by Capability Domain

### 2.1 Domain Coverage Matrix

| Model Domain ID | Capability Domain | Tokio Surface Anchor | Lab Model Coverage Target | Current State | Downstream T8 Contract Target |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `DM01` | Async I/O trait semantics | `tokio::io` + `tokio-util::codec` | deterministic partial-progress/readiness/cancel progression over `AsyncRead`/`AsyncWrite`/codec loops | Partial | `2oh2u.10.2` IO contracts |
| `DM02` | Filesystem semantics | `tokio::fs` | deterministic file lifecycle and path-op ordering under cancellation and retries | Partial | `2oh2u.10.2` FS contracts |
| `DM03` | Process lifecycle | `tokio::process` | deterministic child lifecycle model for spawn/stdio/wait/kill/kill_on_drop | Partial | `2oh2u.10.2` process contracts |
| `DM04` | Signal and shutdown semantics | `tokio::signal` | deterministic signal delivery/coalescing/shutdown propagation model | Partial | `2oh2u.10.2` signal contracts |
| `DM05` | Web/middleware pipeline | `axum` + `tower-http` | deterministic route+layer ordering and cancellation checkpoints | Partial | `2oh2u.10.2` web contracts |
| `DM06` | gRPC streaming semantics | `tonic` | deterministic unary/streaming cancellation and metadata propagation model | Partial | `2oh2u.10.2` gRPC contracts |
| `DM07` | DB wire and pool behaviors | `tokio-postgres`, `mysql_async`, sqlite wrappers | deterministic transaction/pool/retry behavior model | Partial | `2oh2u.10.2` DB contracts |
| `DM08` | Messaging delivery and retry | redis/nats/kafka tokio ecosystems | deterministic delivery/ack/reconnect/idempotency model | Partial | `2oh2u.10.2` messaging contracts |
| `DM09` | Interop adapter boundaries | tokio-locked third-party crates | deterministic bridge semantics for task/time/io adapters without ambient authority | Partial | `2oh2u.10.2` interop contracts |

### 2.2 Required Scenario Families

Each `DM*` domain must map to deterministic scenario families with stable scenario IDs, explicit seed capture, and replayability requirements.

| Scenario Family ID | Domain IDs | Deterministic Inputs | Required Oracles | Required Artifacts |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `LM-S1` (cancel checkpoints) | `DM01`, `DM05`, `DM06` | seed + schedule + virtual-time config | cancellation protocol, loser drain, obligation leak | `event_log.txt`, `failed_assertions.json`, `repro_manifest.json` |
| `LM-S2` (resource lifecycle) | `DM02`, `DM03`, `DM07` | seed + injected failure policy + budget config | task leak, quiescence, region tree | `event_log.txt`, `repro_manifest.json` |
| `LM-S3` (signal/shutdown races) | `DM04`, `DM05` | seed + signal burst pattern + shutdown cadence | cancellation protocol, finalizer, quiescence | `event_log.txt`, `failed_assertions.json` |
| `LM-S4` (protocol fault and retry) | `DM07`, `DM08` | seed + fault-injection map + retry policy | obligation leak, determinism, evidence ledger | `event_log.txt`, `failed_assertions.json`, `repro_manifest.json` |
| `LM-S5` (interop bridge consistency) | `DM09`, `DM01` | seed + adapter mode + bridge timeout config | ambient authority, determinism, task leak | `event_log.txt`, `repro_manifest.json` |
| `LM-S6` (cross-domain replay equivalence) | `DM01`-`DM09` | seed + scenario hash + replay mode | determinism oracle, replay divergence diagnostics | `event_log.txt`, `failed_assertions.json`, `repro_manifest.json` |

---

## 3. Schedule Control and Replay Contract

T8.1 defines deterministic model requirements that must hold across every `DM*` domain.

### 3.1 Schedule-Control Requirements

| Requirement ID | Requirement | Enforced By |
|---|---|---|
| `SC-01` | Every modeled scenario records deterministic seed, virtual time mode, and scheduler knobs. | `src/lab/config.rs`, scenario metadata |
| `SC-02` | Same `(seed, config, scenario)` must produce equivalent oracle verdicts. | `src/lab/runtime.rs`, `src/lab/oracle/determinism.rs` |
| `SC-03` | DPOR/schedule exploration must preserve canonical trace equivalence class IDs. | `src/lab/explorer.rs`, replay diagnostics |
| `SC-04` | Failure injection must be deterministic and replay-addressable. | `src/lab/chaos.rs`, `src/lab/injection.rs` |
| `SC-05` | Cancellation drain paths must remain schedule-observable and bounded by model budget assumptions. | `src/lab/oracle/cancellation_protocol.rs` |

### 3.2 Replay Artifact Contract

| Artifact | Required Fields | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `event_log.txt` | scenario ID, trace ID, seed, phase markers | canonical ordered event sequence for diagnosis |
| `failed_assertions.json` | assertion ID, oracle name, failure context | deterministic machine-readable failure root pointers |
| `repro_manifest.json` | direct repro command, seed/config, fixture pointers | one-command replay and triage handoff |

Artifact schema compatibility must remain stable enough that T8.2 can convert these model requirements into executable conformance contracts without ambiguity.

---

## 4. Model Expansion Gap Register

T8.1 closes planning-level determinism gaps by assigning explicit model requirements per domain. Implementation and contract-gating closure happens in T8.2+.

| Gap ID | Gap | Severity | Owner Surfaces | Evidence Requirement | Downstream Bead |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `LM-G1` | Missing cross-domain deterministic scenario taxonomy | High | `src/lab/scenario.rs`, `src/lab/scenario_runner.rs` | stable `LM-S*` scenario catalog and mapping table | `2oh2u.10.2` |
| `LM-G2` | Missing explicit model linkage for `tokio::io` parity gaps | High | `src/lab/runtime.rs`, `src/lab/oracle/cancellation_protocol.rs` | IO-focused deterministic model contract rows | `2oh2u.10.2` |
| `LM-G3` | Missing deterministic FS path-op + cancellation model spec | Medium | `src/lab/runtime.rs`, `src/lab/oracle/obligation_leak.rs` | FS model scenarios with replay artifacts | `2oh2u.10.2` |
| `LM-G4` | Missing deterministic child-process lifecycle modeling contract | High | `src/lab/runtime.rs`, `src/lab/oracle/task_leak.rs` | process lifecycle scenario requirements | `2oh2u.10.2` |
| `LM-G5` | Missing signal burst/coalescing deterministic model contract | Medium | `src/lab/runtime.rs`, `src/lab/oracle/finalizer.rs` | signal scenario requirements with ordering constraints | `2oh2u.10.2` |
| `LM-G6` | Missing middleware ordering model under cancellation pressure | Medium | `src/lab/runtime.rs`, `src/lab/explorer.rs` | web pipeline scenario requirements | `2oh2u.10.2` |
| `LM-G7` | Missing deterministic unary/streaming gRPC model contract | High | `src/lab/runtime.rs`, `src/lab/replay.rs` | gRPC scenario requirements and oracle expectations | `2oh2u.10.2` |
| `LM-G8` | Missing DB transaction/pool deterministic model contract | High | `src/lab/runtime.rs`, `src/lab/oracle/obligation_leak.rs` | DB model scenarios and closure evidence | `2oh2u.10.2` |
| `LM-G9` | Missing messaging retry/ack deterministic model contract | High | `src/lab/runtime.rs`, `src/lab/oracle/loser_drain.rs` | messaging scenario requirements and replay examples | `2oh2u.10.2` |
| `LM-G10` | Missing adapter-boundary deterministic bridge model | High | `src/lab/runtime.rs`, `src/lab/oracle/ambient_authority.rs` | interop bridge scenario requirements | `2oh2u.10.2` |
| `LM-G11` | Missing cross-domain replay equivalence criteria | Medium | `src/lab/replay.rs`, `src/lab/oracle/determinism.rs` | cross-domain replay pass/fail criteria | `2oh2u.10.2` |
| `LM-G12` | Missing standardized scenario-to-artifact naming constraints | Medium | `src/lab/scenario_runner.rs` | deterministic naming and schema rules | `2oh2u.10.2` |

---

## 5. Execution Mapping for T8.2

T8.1 output is intentionally contractual so T8.2 can convert model intent into executable conformance assets.

| T8.2 Contract Workstream | Consumes from T8.1 | Expected Output |
|---|---|---|
| Domain contract generation | `DM01`-`DM09` matrix + `LM-G*` register | executable domain-level conformance contracts |
| Scenario catalog formalization | `LM-S1`-`LM-S6` taxonomy | deterministic scenario registry with schema validation |
| Replay schema binding | SC-01..SC-05 + artifact contract | strict replay artifact validation and CI gating |
| Oracle selection map | Required-oracle mappings in §2.2 | per-domain oracle policy with pass/fail semantics |

---

## 6. Exit Criteria for T8.1

T8.1 is considered complete when:

1. Deterministic model domain matrix (`DM01`-`DM09`) is published and covers all newly closed replacement baseline domains.
2. Scenario taxonomy (`LM-S1`-`LM-S6`) defines deterministic inputs, required oracles, and artifact outputs.
3. Schedule-control and replay contract requirements are explicit and reference concrete lab/runtime surfaces.
4. Gap register (`LM-G1`-`LM-G12`) maps each remaining modeling gap to owner surfaces and T8.2 downstream closure.
5. Contract test coverage enforces bead linkage, structure, and required token coverage.

This delivers the deterministic-model expansion prerequisite that unblocks `asupersync-2oh2u.10.2`.
